prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: footer action dock background for a mobile game homepage
Primary request: Create a premium horizontal control dock for the lower portion of a game start screen, designed to unify a large primary action button and a secondary garage button.
Scene/backdrop: fully transparent outside the dock silhouette
Subject: one centered wide footer dock panel, front-facing, no perspective
Style: post-apocalyptic sci-fi military UI, dark graphite core, weathered bronze metal trim, subtle amber light accents, premium but restrained, readable and game-ready
Composition: a broad horizontal dock with a strong central zone for a large primary button and a quieter lower or secondary area for a smaller support button; the dock should feel like one integrated command console instead of a popup card
Technical requirements: intended final size around 560x180; keep the central reading area calm and dark; do not make borders too thick; avoid horns, giant pipes, or overly decorative wings; no text, no icons, no arrows, no glowing blobs, no scenery
Output goal: a polished homepage footer dock that helps the action area feel intentional and professional

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: compact utility dock background for a mobile game homepage
Primary request: Create a small sleek utility dock for secondary controls on a start screen, such as a debug or settings shortcut.
Scene/backdrop: fully transparent outside the dock silhouette
Subject: one centered narrow utility bar, front-facing, no perspective
Style: refined wasteland-tech metal UI, dark charcoal, cool gray highlights, small amber guide lights, subtle industrial polish
Composition: a compact horizontal utility bar with a calm center and restrained edge detail, lighter and cleaner than a mission card or popup panel
Technical requirements: intended final size around 260x56; keep it slim, readable, and unobtrusive; no text, no icons, no scenery, no dramatic decorations
Output goal: a subtle professional utility dock that visually belongs to the same homepage family as the hero and stage card
